name: sdlc-plugin
description: Software Development Lifecycle skills, bundled. Six skills covering idea-to-backlog and course-correction: /repo-bootstrap (new GitHub repo from scratch), /repo-level-up (add release/uat + release/prod branches, promotion workflows, secret scanning, branch-protection rulesets), /create-requirements (interactively elicit functional + non-functional requirements into docs/requirements/ — defaults to README.md as the source, asks for an alternative if missing), /confirm-requirements (validate and advance the status of existing requirements), /plan-from-requirements (turn the requirements into a staged plan of small-batch GitHub issues with milestones, labels, and human-required tasks front-loaded), /rework (when an implementation-time discovery invalidates the plan — assertively cleans up stale requirements and issues, with a documented audit trail).
